zh.lifeSummary: 當Christina Fraser of Lovat於大約1270年出生在蘇格蘭斯林史爾圖時，她的父親Sir Andrew Fraser of Touchfraser32歲，母親Beatrix Cheyne31歲。她於1290年之前與Tormod Norman MacLeod 2nd Clan Chief of Harris在蘇格蘭結婚。他們至少是4個兒子的父母。她去世於1302年之後在蘇格蘭音巴內-爾哈里斯，埋葬在蘇格蘭阿吉爾易納。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Christina Fraser of Lovat于大约1270年出生在苏格兰斯林史爾圖时，她的父亲Sir Andrew Fraser of Touchfraser32岁，母亲Beatrix Cheyne31岁。她于1290年之前与Tormod Norman MacLeod 2nd Clan Chief of Harris在苏格兰结婚。他们至少是4个儿子的父母。她去世于1302年之后在苏格兰音巴內-爾哈里斯，埋葬在苏格兰阿吉爾易納。

nameMeanings.name: Fraser
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish: apparently a nickname from Anglo-Norman French fraser(e), fresere ‘strawberry plant’. Fresel and Frisel, from Anglo-Norman French fresel ‘strawberry’, are early variants of the Fraser surname, the modern Gaelicized form of which is Friseal. See Frizzell . The crest on the Scottish family's coat of arms takes the form of a strawberry plant, but its antiquity is unknown. Claims of a habitational derivation, in particular from a place called la Frézelière in Anjou (France), are attractive but they lack verifiable evidence.
Americanized form of one or more similar (like-sounding) Jewish surnames.

History: There are two clans Fraser in Scotland, with common ancestry going back to Simon Fraser of Keith in East Lothian, who lived in the 12th century. One of these clans has its seat at Philorth Castle (subsequently re-named Cairnbulg) on the northeast coast of Scotland. Sir Alexander Fraser, 8th laird of Philorth (c. 1536–1623) converted the fishing village of Faithlie into the burgh of Fraserburgh in the 1590s. The other clan is Fraser of Lovat, associated mainly with the city of Inverness are. They are descended from Simon Fraser, a younger son, who lived in the early 14th century. In Gaelic, the head of Clan Fraser of Lovat is known as Mac Shimi ‘son of Simon’.

variants.name: Frayser
meanings: Probably an altered form of   Fraser  .

variants.name: Frasier
meanings: Scottish and northern Irish: variant of   Fraser  .

variants.name: Frazer
meanings: Variant of   Fraser  , associated chiefly with northern Ireland.

variants.name: Frashier
meanings: Scottish and northern Irish: variant of   Fraser  .

variants.name: Frizzell
meanings: English and Irish: nickname from Old French fresel, frisel ‘lace, ribbon, braid, brooch, frill, ruff’, for someone with an ornate style of dress, or ‘object of little value’ (a diminutive of frese, of ancient Germanic origin).
Scottish: from Anglo-Norman French fresel ‘strawberry’, an alternative form of Fraser .

variants.name: Frazier
meanings: English and Scottish: variant of   Fraser  .

variants.name: Frasher
meanings: Scottish and northern Irish: variant of   Fraser  .
Possibly an altered form of German Fratzscher (see Frutchey ).

nameMeanings.name: Christina
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Simplified form of Latin Christiana, feminine form of Christianus ( see Christian ), or a Latinized form of Middle English Christin ‘Christian’ (Old English christen, from Latin).

en.lifeSummary: When Christina Fraser of Lovat was born about 1270, in Touch, Stirlingshire, Scotland, her father, Sir Andrew Fraser of Touchfraser, was 32 and her mother, Beatrix Cheyne, was 31. She married Tormod Norman MacLeod 2nd Clan Chief of Harris before 1290, in Scotland. They were the parents of at least 4 sons. She died after 1302, in Harris, Inverness-shire, Scotland, and was buried in Iona, Argyll, Scotland.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Christina Fraser of Lovat est née environ 1270, à Touch, Stirlingshire, Écosse, son père, Sir Andrew Fraser of Touchfraser, avait 32 ans et sa mère, Beatrix Cheyne, avait 31 ans. Elle a épousé Tormod Norman MacLeod 2nd Clan Chief of Harris avant 1290, à Écosse. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils. Elle est décédée après 1302, à Harris, Inverness-shire, Écosse, et a été enterrée à Iona, Argyll, Écosse.

Lei sposato Tormod Norman MacLeod 2nd Clan Chief of Harris prima del 1290, nel Scotland. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli. Morì dopo il 1302, nel Harris, Inverness-shire, Scotland, e fu sepolta a Iona, Argyll, Scotland.

ja.lifeSummary: Christina Fraser of Lovatが約1270年にスコットランドスティルリングシュアイアトウチで生まれた時，父Sir Andrew Fraser of Touchfraserは32歳，母Beatrix Cheyneは31歳であった。1290年以前にスコットランドでTormod Norman MacLeod 2nd Clan Chief of Harrisと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子の親であった。彼女は1302年以後にスコットランドインバーネス-シュアイアハーリスで死去し，スコットランドアルグイルアイオナにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Christina Fraser of Lovat(이)가 대략 1270년 스컷랜드 스티를링실르 토우치에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Andrew Fraser of Touchfraser(은)는 32세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Beatrix Cheyne(은)는 31세였다. 그녀는 1290년 이전 스컷랜드에서 Tormod Norman MacLeod 2nd Clan Chief of Harris(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1302년 이후 스컷랜드 인버네스-실르 해리스에서 사망했으며 스컷랜드 아그이 이오나에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Christina Fraser of Lovat nasceu aproximadamente 1270, em Touch, Stirlingshire, Scotland, seu pai, Sir Andrew Fraser of Touchfraser, tinha 32 anos e sua mãe, Beatrix Cheyne, tinha 31 anos. Ela casou-se com Tormod Norman MacLeod 2nd Clan Chief of Harris antes 1290, em Scotland. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos. Ela faleceu após 1302, em Harris, Inverness-shire, Scotland, e foi sepultada em Iona, Argyll, Scotland.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Christina Fraser of Lovat родилась около 1270 г. в местности тоуч, стирлингшир, Шотландия, её отцу по имени Sir Andrew Fraser of Touchfraser было 32 года, а матери, которую звали Beatrix Cheyne, 31. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Tormod Norman MacLeod 2nd Clan Chief of Harris перед 1290 г. в местности Шотландия. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына. Она умерла после 1302 г. в местности харрис, инвирнесс-шир, Шотландия и была похоронена в местности иона, аргилл, Шотландия.
